parameters.content:
## 📅 Apex SDR Pipeline — Call Booking

**What this workflow does:**
Receives a webhook from Instantly when a lead replies positively → finds their row in the Google Sheet → updates status to 'call_booked' and logs the Calendly booking link.

**Trigger:** Instantly webhook (positive reply / meeting booked event)

**Flow:**
Instantly Webhook → Extract Lead Email → Find Sheet Row → Update Row (status = call_booked, booking link logged)

**Setup:**
1. In Instantly → Settings → Webhooks, add the Production webhook URL from the 'Instantly Webhook' node.
2. Select the event type: 'Reply' or 'Meeting Booked' (whichever Instantly supports for your plan).
3. Set your Calendly/Cal.com booking URL in the 'Update Sheet — Call Booked' node.

nodes.name: Instantly Webhook
nodes.description: Receives POST from Instantly on positive reply or meeting booked event. Copy the Production URL and paste it into Instantly Settings → Webhooks.

nodes.name: Extract Lead Email
nodes.description: Parses the Instantly webhook payload and extracts the lead email. Throws a clear error if the email field can't be found, so it surfaces in n8n execution logs.

nodes.name: Find Sheet Row by Email
nodes.description: Looks up the lead's email in the Inventor Email column to find their row. If the lead is an attorney, you may need a second lookup on the Attorney Email column.

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets — REPLACE WITH YOUR CREDENTIAL

nodes.name: Row Found?
nodes.description: Checks if the Google Sheet lookup returned a matching row. If not found, logs a warning and responds to Instantly with a 200 OK to prevent retries.

value.Notes: =Reply received {{ $('Extract Lead Email').item.json.received_at }}. Booking link sent: DEMO_CALENDLY_BOOKING_URL

nodes.name: Update Sheet — Call Booked
nodes.description: Updates the Sheet row: Status → Call Booked. Notes field logs the timestamp and the Calendly booking URL. Replace DEMO_CALENDLY_BOOKING_URL with your actual booking link.

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets — REPLACE WITH YOUR CREDENTIAL

nodes.name: Respond 200 OK
nodes.description: Sends a 200 OK back to Instantly to confirm receipt and prevent webhook retries.

parameters.responseBody: ={"success": true, "message": "Row not found — no update made"}

nodes.name: Respond 200 — Row Not Found
nodes.description: Returns 200 even when no row is found, so Instantly doesn't retry. Execution log will show the missing email for manual follow-up.
